steps.action: Run canonical flow in isolated workspace/cache: `printf <initialize-json> | npx -y spikes-mcp`
steps.expected: `npx spikes-mcp` starts MCP server and emits initialize response.
steps.observed: Command failed before wrapper startup with npm registry E404 for `spikes-mcp`; no initialize response emitted.

steps.action: Run fallback flow: `npm pack /Users/moritzbierling/werk/repos/spikes/packages/spikes-mcp` then `printf <initialize-json> | npx --yes --package <tarball> spikes-mcp`
steps.expected: Local tarball wrapper can start MCP and return initialize response.
steps.observed: Fallback returned initialize JSON (`serverInfo.name=spikes-mcp`, `protocolVersion=2024-11-05`) proving wrapper/MCP startup path works when package is supplied locally.

issues.message: Canonical npm distribution path unavailable: registry returned E404 for `spikes-mcp`, preventing `npx spikes-mcp` startup.

evidence.output:
npm error code E404
npm error 404 Not Found - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/spikes-mcp - Not found
...
npm error 404 The requested resource `spikes-mcp@*` could not be found ...

stdout: {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"tools":{}},"serverInfo":{"name":"spikes-mcp","version":"0.3.1"}}}
stderr: spikes-mcp: downloading binary for aarch64-apple-darwin...
spikes-mcp: binary ready at .../node_modules/.cache/spikes-mcp/spikes
[spikes-mcp] Starting MCP server on stdio...
Error: Request failed: MCP server error: connection closed: initialize notification

frictions: Canonical route depended on npm registry availability; package lookup returned E404 and required fallback execution to continue validation.
blockers: Publish `spikes-mcp` package to npm (or otherwise restore canonical distribution) so `npx -y spikes-mcp` can be validated end-to-end.
